titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/167

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=369 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:41:55.206279+00 | translation moa=370 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:41:57.231279+00

div.p:
Omnibus sancte Matris Ecclesie filiis presentibus et futuris Walterus de Ridale filius et heres Patricii de Ridale Salutem .
Sciatis me concessisse et hac carta mea confirmasse deo et Ecclesie sancte Marie de Melros . et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus pro
salute anime mee et anime patris mei et pro animabus omnium antecessorum meorum et successorum omnes donaciones quas pater meus
dedit eisdem monachis in territorio de Wittun' . in perpetuam elemosinam . per terminos et diuisas in Cartis patris mei nominatas . ita
libere et quiete plene et honorifice sicut carte patris mei plenius testantur . Concessi etiam eis et hac carta mea confirmaui omnes confirmaciones
patris mei et omnes terras quas habent de Roberto de Bernolfebi et de Gaufrido Coco . sicut carte ipsius Roberti et eiusdem Gaufridi et
confirmaciones patris mei testantur . Quare uolo ut predicti monachi totas terras prenominatas teneant et possideant in bene et pace
cum omnibus terminis et pertinenciis suis sicut puram elemosinam . quietas et solutas ab omni tereno seruicio et consuetudine et exactione
seculari secundum tenorem cartarum prenominatarum . saluo seruicio de eodem Roberto et Gaufrido coco . Hiis Testibus . Ricardo Decano de Te
vidale et Officiali . Willelmo filio Iohannis . Thoma de Coleuill' . Ricardo Nano . Symone . de Grubheued . Radulfo de Ridale . Iohanne de mac
keswell' Ada de Chathov . Ada de Wittun' . Ricardo de Hetun' . Hugone de Neubotl' . Willelmo nepote meo . et multis aliis .

p.cl: To All sons of Holy Mother Church present and future Walter of Ryedale son and heir of Patrick of Ryedale sends greeting

. Know me to have granted and by this my charter to have made firm to God and to the Church of St Mary at Melrose, and to the monks serving God in that place, for the salvation of my soul and the soul of my father and for the souls of all my ancestors and successors all the donations that my father gave to the same monks in the territory of Whitton, in perpetual alms, by the borders and boundaries named in the charters of my father, as freely and quitely, fully and honourably, as the charters of my father more fully bear witness. I have also granted to them and by this my charter have made firm all the confirmations of my father and all the lands that they have from Robert of Barnoldby and of Geoffrey the cook, as the charters of Robert and of the same Geoffrey and the confirmations of my father bear witness. Wherefore I will that the foresaid monks hold and possess the whole lands forenamed well and in peace with all their borders and boundaries as pure alms, quit and released from every earthly service and custom and secular exaction according to the terms of the forenamed charters, saving the service of the same Robert and Geoffrey the cook.

With these witnesses: Richard, dean of Teviotdale and official; William son of John; Thomas de Colville; Richard le Nain; Simon of Grubbit; Ralph of Ryedale; John of Maxwell; Adam of Chatto; Adam of Whitton; Richard of Heton; Hugh of Newbattle; William my nephew; and many others.
